positive: A minimalist, stylish, symmetrical abstract geometric composition featuring interconnected celestial elements and crystalline flora. The primary subject is a stylized cosmic forest structure, using clean, sharp silhouettes of moons, planets, and crystalline leaves. The color palette should be sophisticated and limited: deep indigo, ethereal cyan, burnished gold, and cream. The style should evoke Art Deco and bioluminescent naturalism, presented on a solid, contrasting background. High contrast, perfect symmetry, vector illustration quality, highly detailed line work, clean edges, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noise, poor composition, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient fade, busy background
